title: Define GunData + PluginInstance records, Codecs, and register DataComponentType

reference_files.reason: GunData Component and PluginInstance structure - gunId, gunInstanceUuid, installedPlugins, modifierVersion, state fields
System 2: Gun instance data - GunData field semantics, persistence requirements

acceptance_criteria: PluginInstance record defined with fields: pluginId (ResourceLocation), instanceUuid (UUID), installedTypeId (ResourceLocation), locked (boolean, default false)

GunData record defined with fields: gunId (ResourceLocation), gunInstanceUuid (UUID), installedPlugins (List<PluginInstance>), modifierVersion (int, default 0), state (Map<ResourceLocation, Object> using Codec dispatch)
Codec<PluginInstance> defined with correct serialization for all 4 fields
Codec<GunData> defined with correct serialization for all 5 fields, installedPlugins defaults to empty list, state defaults to empty map
DataComponentType<GunData> registered via DeferredRegister.DataComponents in ModularShoot class
DATA_COMPONENTS DeferredRegister registered on mod event bus in ModularShoot constructor
